title: The Lightning Warrior
writer: Ford Beebe, Wyndham Gittens, Colbert Clark
actors: Rin Tin Tin, Frankie Darro, Hayden Stevenson
plot: A Rin-Tin-Tin serial presented in 12 episodes. The mysterious Wolf Man is terrorizing settlers in a western town. With the help of Rinty, young Jimmy Carter unmasks the Wolf Man and foils his evil plot.
